name: seedance
description: Plan and produce short videos with Seedance, including Hermes autonomous loops, TikTok ad ops, story scenes, cast-reference libraries, market-demand hooks, and external audio/subtitle handoff.

interface.longDescription: A generic short-video workflow for planning, image-to-video prompting, Hermes autonomous run loops, TikTok ad operations checks, cast-reference selection, TikTok story scenes, market-demand hook selection, external voice-over/subtitle handoff, reviewing, and packaging Seedance videos with rights, budget, retry, and delivery guardrails.
defaultPrompt: Plan a short video with Seedance.
Plan a TikTok story video using a cast reference library.
Optimize a short-video concept from public demand patterns.
Prepare TikTok Ads creative checks, A/B tests, and post-launch learning.
Run Hermes-style autonomous creative iterations with explicit permission caps.
Review a Seedance video brief before generation.
